cardenergy:ScrapBurst.NAME: Scrap Burst
cardenergy:ScrapBurst.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Consume. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.

cardenergy:Recovery.NAME: Recovery
cardenergy:Recovery.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Return up to !M! exhausted cards to your discard pile.

cardenergy:RottingShelter.NAME: Rotting Shelter
cardenergy:RottingShelter.DESCRIPTION: cardenergy:Rot. NL Gain !B! Block. Draw !M! card.

cardenergy:Stockpile.NAME: Stockpile
cardenergy:Stockpile.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Gain !B! Block. NL NL cardenergy:Hoard 3.

cardenergy:ScrapSpray.NAME: Scrap Spray
cardenergy:ScrapSpray.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Add 1 Junk to your discard pile.

cardenergy:SalvageSwing.NAME: Salvage Swing
cardenergy:SalvageSwing.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If a card was Exhausted this turn, gain !M! Block.

cardenergy:SetShoulder.NAME: Set Shoulder
cardenergy:SetShoulder.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. If you were attacked last turn, gain !M! additional Block.

cardenergy:HurlTheHeap.NAME: Hurl the Heap
cardenergy:HurlTheHeap.DESCRIPTION: Deal !M! damage for each card in your exhaust pile.

cardenergy:DugIn.NAME: Shoulder the Load
cardenergy:DugIn.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Add 1 Junk to your discard pile.

cardenergy:LooseParts.NAME: Sort the Haul
cardenergy:LooseParts.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards. NL Add 1 Junk to your discard pile.

cardenergy:AshenCount.NAME: Ashen Count
cardenergy:AshenCount.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If a card was Exhausted this turn, deal !M! additional damage.

cardenergy:Patchwork.NAME: Patchwork
cardenergy:Patchwork.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust 1 card from your hand. Draw !M! cards. NL Add 1 Junk to your discard pile.

cardenergy:BarbedGuard.NAME: Barbed Guard
cardenergy:BarbedGuard.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. If an enemy attacks you this turn, deal 4 damage to it.

cardenergy:TurnAside.NAME: Pack Away
cardenergy:TurnAside.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! card. Put 1 card from your hand on top of your draw pile.

cardenergy:HiddenCache.NAME: Hidden Cache
cardenergy:HiddenCache.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Discard 2 cards. NL NL cardenergy:Hoard 3.

cardenergy:ScavengeTheWreck.NAME: Scavenge the Wreck
cardenergy:ScavengeTheWreck.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust 1 card from your discard pile. Draw !M! card(s).

cardenergy:PreciousBauble.NAME: Precious Bauble
cardenergy:PreciousBauble.DESCRIPTION: Innate. Retain. Unplayable. NL While in hand: After discard (before enemies act), gain 1 Intangible. At the start of your turn, lose 1 Max HP. You cannot play Attack cards.

cardenergy:UpendThePack.NAME: Upend the Pack
cardenergy:UpendThePack.DESCRIPTION: Discard your hand, then draw that many cards. NL Exhaust.
cardenergy:UpendThePack.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Discard your hand, then draw that many cards.

cardenergy:Scrapstorm.NAME: Scrapstorm
cardenergy:Scrapstorm.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Add 1 Scrap to your discard pile.

cardenergy:StripTheWreck.NAME: Strip the Wreck
cardenergy:StripTheWreck.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust up to 2 cards from your hand. NL Gain !M! Thorns for each card Exhausted this way. NL Exhaust.

cardenergy:BreakdownRush.NAME: Breakdown Rush
cardenergy:BreakdownRush.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deals !M! additional damage for each card Exhausted this turn.

cardenergy:Junk.NAME: Junk
cardenergy:Junk.DESCRIPTION: Playable only if you have at least 2 other Junk or Scrap cards in your hand. NL Exhaust all Junk and Scrap in your hand. Add a random Uncommon Terracotta card to your hand. NL Exhaust.

cardenergy:Scrap.NAME: Scrap
cardenergy:Scrap.DESCRIPTION: Playable only if you have at least 1 other Scrap card in your hand. NL Exhaust all Scrap in your hand. Add a random Rare Terracotta card to your hand. NL Exhaust.
